feed.title: SAP Community - SAP NetWeaver
feed.subtitle: SAP NetWeaver Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Problem in SUM - PREP_INPUT_CHECK/READDATA_EXP - Upgrade SAP BW System
entry.content:
Hello Support,

we want to upgrade our SAP BW System T02 to Netweaver 750 and current sp-Stack - see attached Screenshot.

In SUM we got in PREP_INPUT_CHECK/READDATA_EXP the error 

Could not find suitable DVDs for product NW required for the procedure.

The requested data carrier is not mounted on any of the mount points you entered.

Enter at least the mount point containing Export DVD for product NW.

I found note 2957413 - Incorrect DVD number in SUM phase: PREP_INPUT_CHECK/READDATA_EXP 

So I think I had to change configuration in Maintenance Planner - but I am not sure.

Can you help me out?

Best Regards

Christoph Greiner

entry.title: How to find Content Server data store
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have ECC 6 with EHP 7 SP12 system and one Content server (Database is MaxDB). 

All the PDF, JPG files are stored into Content server this is working since last 5 yeas, now we have a new requirement to store all other data also move to Content server, for that management is asking us, month wise how much data will be store into Content server and what will be size of each document.

 

We found the table TOA01 tables, which is show number of data store into Content server, but we are not able to find the size of the data. 

Please help us, is there any query in ECC end to get the data as well as size of each document. 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Is ASE License going to be extended for SAP NW AS ABAP Developer Edition 7.52 (NPL) from 2025?
entry.content:
The current ASE license provided on the following download page is going to expire on March 31st, 2025.

https://developers.sap.com/trials-downloads.html?search=7.52

Is there any extension planned for this ASE license? If so, where can it be found?

If not, what are the other options to run a local trial SAP system for ABAP learning purposes?

entry.title: Frage zu Note 3458956: Integration Leistungsgruppen in BW-Healthcare-Content
entry.content:
Die Note 3458956 beschreibt die Integration der Leistungsgruppen für die Erstellung des §21-Datensatzes:

Mit den Support Packages im März 2025 wurden Funktionen/Anpassungen zur Verfügung gestellt, damit

  • die Stammdaten der Leistungsgruppen im System hinterlegt werden können,
  • das Programm RNAP21K01 dazu in der Lage ist, die beiden neuen Dateien KRANKENHAUSSTRUKTUR_LEISTUNGSGRUPPEN und ARZTQUALIFIKATION_LEISTUNGSGRUPPEN erstellen zu können und
  • das Programm RNAP21F01 dazu in der Lage ist, in der Datei FALL die Spalten LG-Bezug und Leistungsgruppe erstellen zu können.

Für uns ergeben sich die Frage: Wird es eine Integration der Leistungsgruppen in den BW-Healthcare-Content geben? Wann wird damit zu rechnen sein?

entry.title: Are necessary to stop ASE server and replication in order to DUMP and DISK RESIZE in ASE?
entry.content:
Issue : 

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

ASE @Site1
##
00:0003:00000:00025:2024/10/29 22:43:08.03 server  Error: 1105, Severity: 17, State: 2
00:0003:00000:00025:2024/10/29 22:43:08.08 server  Can't allocate space for object 'js_output' in database 'sybmgmtdb' because 'default' segment is full/has no free extents. If you ran out of space in syslogs, dump the transaction log. Otherwise, use ALTER DATABASE to increase the size of the segment.
...
00:0003:00000:00019:2025/03/12 14:45:03.83 server  Error: 1105, Severity: 17, State: 2
00:0003:00000:00019:2025/03/12 14:45:03.83 server  Can't allocate space for object 'js_history' in database 'sybmgmtdb' because 'default' segment is full/has no free extents. If you ran out of space in syslogs, dump the transaction log. Otherwise, use ALTER DATABASE to increase the size of the segment.
00:0003:00000:00019:2025/03/12 14:45:03.83 kernel  Job Scheduler (js__exec_handler): Exception 3602 raised.
00:0003:00000:00019:2025/03/12 14:45:03.83 kernel  Job Scheduler got exception for execution token 1.
##

 

Our actions for this problem: 

 

1.Take the backup of sybmgmtdb database in primary Site1 node.

 

dump database sybmgmtdb to "/path/sybmgmtdb.dmp"

 

If we run it when primary DB, application and Replication is online and running then should it be a problem ?

 

OR 

 

2.

 

Check database current log devices:

 

sp_helpdb <SID>
go

 

To resize an existing log device:

 

use master
go
disk resize name = '<existing_log_device_name>', size = '<size in GB>G'  -- size is what is being added, not the total target size of the device
go
alter database <dbname> log on <existing_log_device_name> = '<size in GB>G' 
go

 

If we run it when primary DB, application and Replication is online and running then should it be a problem ?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Native driver not recognised
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to update my ADS system. Right when starting SUM I get the following error message:

 

I checked, and the driver is installed:

I also checked that I unpacked and started SUM with the SIDADM user as this caused some problems in the past.

Do you know what I need to check or edit to get SUM to use the driver?

I don't want to change the whole system to this driver, as ADS is using the SAP Standard driver.

entry.title: Export from SAP to Spreadsheet > comma separator is changing to dot
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Would like to ask for your help regarding this issue being encountered by a specific user.

He's exporting ALV from SAP to spreadhseet. However, the export is showing "Excel error "We found a problem with some content in '<filename>.xls'" then it will attempt to repair the file. Upon repair, it will remove comma separator and replace it with dot (e.g  from 2,321,858.98 in SAP, export to excel will show 2.321,858.98/ from 282,244.00 SAP to 282.244.00).

Following are the notes and items already checked:

1. Uninstall SAP and Excel - same issue

2. Tried the user to access SAP on my machine - same issue. But if I tried to do it from my end on my machine - no issue (all good)

3. Other users has no issue issue, only this specific has it.

4. Created test ID in test system copied from user's ID in production - no issue (all good). So seems not authorization issue in SAP.

Can you please let me know if there are any additional checks I can perform? Thank you so much!

entry.title: SAProuter niping error partner not reached
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Would you please help me to solve this problem?

I have successfully run up to “SAP Logon Configuration” as described below.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_EMPLOYEE_CENTRAL_PAYROLL/f4cfcfccbd5940bc9edb7c11fb2e8f2a/bc82d46bf3c4408fba151c3cbe5154aa.html?locale=en-US 

But when I run niping, I get the error shown in the figure below.

*** ERROR => NiBufIProcMsg: hdl 1 received rc=-92 (NIEROUT_CONN_REFUSED) from peer [nibuf.cpp 2028]
*** ERROR => NiBufIConnect: route connect for non-buffered hdl 1 failed (rc=-92;/H/1**.**.**.***/S/3299/H/payroll50.sapsf.eu/S/3299); pong not received [nibuf.cpp 4734]
*** ERROR => NiTClientLoop: NiHandle (rc=-92) [nixxtst.cpp 3417]

*****************************************************************************
*
* LOCATION SAProuter 40.4 on '*****'
* ERROR partner 'payroll50.sapsf.eu:3299' not reached
*
* TIME Wed Mar 26 16:02:00 2025
* RELEASE 754
* COMPONENT NI (network interface)
* VERSION 40
* RC -92
* MODULE D:/depot/bas/754_REL/src/base/ni/nixxi.cpp
* LINE 3454
* DETAIL NiPConnect2: 35.243.***.***:3299
* SYSTEM CALL connect
* ERRNO 10060
* ERRNO TEXT WSAETIMEDOUT: Connection timed out
* COUNTER 15
*
*****************************************************************************

I am also unable to log in to the SAP GUI.

What I have been able to do so far is as follows.
1, SAProuter can be run successfully.
2、The setting of new OSS communication is completed in transaction STC01.
3、SAP GUI setup is completed. (SAP STRING:/H/<my local IP>/S/3299/H/payroll50.sapsf.eu/S/3299)
4, All firewalls are disabled.

Now I am concerned about
1, Is there a problem with the contents of the SAProuttab file?
2, Is the content of the SAP STRING problematic?

This is my saprouttab file.

And now dev_rout content is below.

Wed Mar 26 15:36:04 2025
NiHLGetHostName: to get ***.**.**.*** succeeded in 4533ms (tl=2000ms)

Wed Mar 26 15:36:25 2025
***LOG Q0I=> NiPConnect2: 35.243.103.152:3299: connect (10060: WSAETIMEDOUT: Connection timed out) [D:/depot/bas/754_REL/src/base/ni/nixxi.cpp 3454]
*** ERROR => NiPConnect2: SiPeekPendConn failed for hdl 17/sock 876
(SI_ECONN_REFUSE/10060; I4; ST; 35.243.103.152:3299) [nixxi.cpp 3454]

Wed Mar 26 16:02:00 2025
***LOG Q0I=> NiPConnect2: **.***.***.***:3299: connect (10060: WSAETIMEDOUT: Connection timed out) [D:/depot/bas/754_REL/src/base/ni/nixxi.cpp 3454]
*** ERROR => NiPConnect2: SiPeekPendConn failed for hdl 18/sock 908
(SI_ECONN_REFUSE/10060; I4; ST; **.***.***.***:3299) [nixxi.cpp 3454]
*** ERROR => NiBufReceive S10/18 'payroll50.sapsf.eu' failed (rc=-10) [nirout.cpp 3369]

Kind regards

entry.title: Last Logon date not updated in SAP in USR02 table.
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

we have encountered an Audit issue where user when login in from SAPGUI, users login is getting recorded properly in USR02 table. 
But when users are login in from Fiori or salesfore, etc. the login Records are not updating in table, though the users are having same SAP id.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Custom button calling a custom screen
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am working in a RAP managed scenario where we have a custom screen ( OData V4 - UI ) and on that screen we have a custom button and the requirement is:

When the user clicks on the custom button, a new screen should appear (with the same data as the home screen and new fields), on that new screen the user will fill in some data, click on a button and we will process that data.

Is it possible to build this scenario? How can I make a custom button call a custom screen? And how can I develop this new screen?

Please, any help will be appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: Updating hostname of AIX having Netweaver server installed
entry.content:
Hi ,

Do we need to update Netweaver server license/reactive again, if we change hostname of AIX server ?

entry.title: How to improve replication in sap system during system refresh
entry.content:
Hi Team, Greetings!We are planning to refresh our satellite or source systems CAG(AFS), CBG(BW), CRG(RET)Post refresh, we will be replicating data from these source systems to PERSON_NAME Cloud.AFS- 286 tables to be replicated >> this will take 3 days.BW - 45 tables to be replicated >> Not more than half day.RET - 452 tables to be replicated >> This will take 5 days.Currently we have another project coming and we have a tight schedule and need to ensure all these replication finishes as soon as possible.Previously we were following below approach:Start with replication of AFS first, once done, deactivate the config and then start with replication of RET.When we performed replication for AFS and RET in parallel, we observed that it took more time.Could you let us know what would be the best approach to get these replications completed sooner.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Connect SAP 4.7 to SAP Netweaver Gateway as a Hub Deployment
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We have requirement to connect SAP 4.7 system with SAP NW gateway system (as a hub deployment). We are planning to expose o-data services through NW gateway system.  But as a first step can we really connect SAP 4.7 with gateway 2.0 as 4.7 doesn't have netweaver components?

If not, then can we have webservice created in SAP 4.7 to expose the data to SAP UI5 applications?

Thank you in advance for your valuable input.

entry.title: SAP NetWeaver 7.50 PO installation
entry.content:
Hello team,

We got requirement to install SAP netwever 7.5 po stack 30

can you confirm  RHEL 9.0 version can be support oracle 19c and SAP NetWeaver 7.50(PO)

Thanks, 

Jagadeesh

entry.title: Data migration error for tables with huge records
entry.content:
We are doing remote conversion from BW **on PERSON_NAME to BW4HANA.

As part of data migration we found errors while migrating below tables during READ.

/BIC/AZ***0100    -  3 billion records
/BIC/AZ*** 0500    - 45 million records
/BIC/FZ*** 14      - 2.1 billion records
/BIC/FZ*** 14      - 3.3 billion records

From job log we couldn't find any error. Tried REDO still results in error.

Need your inputs to fix the issue.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Deploy IDM component on PO system
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

Do we need license to deploy IDM component on PO (Process Orchestration) system? We have PO license.

Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: MD73 Assigned Quantity Field
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a requirement to develop a custom report using data from MD73 transaction. However, I am having trouble getting the values for 'Assigned Qty' field.

I can get most of the other fields using BAPI_MATERIAL_STOCK_REQ_LIST or MD_STOCK_REQUIREMENTS_LIST_API, but this field is missing.

Submitting the report SAPMM60X does not work, and I have also tried calling FM 'REQUIREMENTS_ALLOCATION'  using the same input as the standard program, but the results I get are different from the ones in MD73.

Is there any other bapi/method?

Regards,

Tudor

entry.title: Problem after migration TREX
entry.content:
Dear Support,

During the migration of TREX, we recreated the indexes with the same ID as the original system, but it takes a long time to transition from the "to be preprocessed" state to the "to be indexed" state.

The indexing occurs, but very slowly.

What can we do?

entry.title: Unable to edit infoobjects in the BW modeller
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

Not able to edit infoobject in the HANA BW modeller in the WAD system of Colgate.

giving me the error as not authorized

entry.title: Change TREX UI port.
entry.content:
When we launch transaction ESH_COCKPIT, by default the URL is going to port 8000.

How do we change to 8443?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
